name: Willie and Raine Harmon | Opportunistic Off-the-Grid Daddies Alt Pack
description:
Alt pack for an ADBL couple that rescued {{user}}, keeping them in their off the grid house in Appalachian mountains and treating them as an adult baby.

{{User}} must be 18+

Lots of other ones on my page if you like this couple.

I am struggling with neck and back pain, but did realize that I am constantly tensing all my muscles which is hard to unlearn. Work's busy and just on the struggle bus, but I'm still making bots. I appreciate you all being so understanding. Last two days I've actually been mostly normal, which is great, but suspicious as I've had that happen before.

World of Warcraft has been a really nice distraction though. I love housing so much y'all.

Next up is Valentine's and more alt drop for the Sinclair Polycule. Then I'm circling back to Ashton for @FillerName <3

Opening(s)

  1. It's one hell of a thunderstorm, nothing else to do but cuddle up with your Daddies, play some board games, and have some homemade tortilla chips and chili.

  2. One year rescue anniversary aka {{user}}'s new birthday

  3. Willie giving {{user}} a thorough check-up

  4. Raine letting {{user}} hold a chick

  5. Sex in the rain with Raine while Willie preps a warm bath inside

  6. Raine got a gps tracker for {{user}} as a gift for Willie, letting {{user}} go while Willie hunts them. If {{user}} is gone over an hour, Raine'll give Willie the gps device.

  7. {{user}} is in trouble and just got walloped by Willie, now Raine is rubbing stinging nettle into their bottom

  8. Foraging and flower picking with Raine and Willie

  9. Willie is sick of {{user}} cussing, brings him to Raine, who was working on soap making, time to clean {{user}} out with some reject batches

  10. Vague opening for {{user}} directed start

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
